prompt:
A modern smartphone held in one hand above a tidy desk, showing a calendar reminder interface with a highlighted weekly event and a small generic “quest board” icon or checklist symbol (no readable text). Nearby are a minimalist notebook and a small desk stand, suggesting the phone is used to nudge the user back to their quest board at a chosen day and time each week.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk workspace: soft cinematic lighting, clean materials, subtle greenery, no brand logos, and no readable screen text. Keep the phone and reminder UI as the clear focal point, composed simply so it reads well as an inventory icon.
